% Auto-generated by scripts/verify_energy_conditions.py
% Equatorial slice; signature (-+++); c = G = 1
\begin{small}
\subsection{Energy condition contractions}
For a null vector $k^\mu$ with $k^\varphi=1$ and $g_{\mu\nu}k^\mu k^\nu=0$,
\begin{equation}
  k^t = \frac{r e^{\frac{\alpha r_{0}}{r} + \frac{\beta r}{r_{0}}}}{\omega_{0} r e^{\frac{\alpha r_{0}}{r} + \beta} - e^{\frac{\beta r}{r_{0}}}}.
\end{equation}
\begin{equation}
\begin{aligned}
\Tmn k^\mu k^\nu\;\text{(NEC)} &= \frac{1}{16 \pi r^{3} r_{0}^{2} \left(\omega_{0} r e^{\frac{\alpha r_{0}}{r} + \beta} - e^{\frac{\beta r}{r_{0}}}\right)^{2}}\Bigl(2 \alpha^{2} r r_{0}^{4} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&- 2 \alpha^{2} r_{0}^{5} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&- 2 \alpha \beta \omega_{0} r^{4} r_{0}^{2} e^{\beta} e^{\frac{\alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{\beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&+ 2 \alpha \beta \omega_{0} r^{3} r_{0}^{3} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{\beta} e^{\frac{\alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{\beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&+ \alpha \gamma r r_{0}^{4} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&- 2 \alpha r^{2} r_{0}^{3} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&+ 3 \alpha r r_{0}^{4} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&- 2 \beta^{2} \omega_{0}^{2} r^{7} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} \\
&+ 2 \beta^{2} \omega_{0}^{2} r^{6} r_{0} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} \\
&- 2 \beta^{2} \omega_{0} r^{6} e^{\beta} e^{\frac{\alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{\beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&+ 2 \beta^{2} \omega_{0} r^{5} r_{0} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{\beta} e^{\frac{\alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{\beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&+ \beta \gamma \omega_{0} r^{4} r_{0}^{2} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{\beta} e^{\frac{\alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{\beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&+ 8 \beta \omega_{0} r^{5} r_{0} e^{\beta} e^{\frac{\alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{\beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&- 7 \beta \omega_{0} r^{4} r_{0}^{2} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{\beta} e^{\frac{\alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{\beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&- \gamma r^{2} r_{0}^{3} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&- 2 r^{3} r_{0}^{2} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&+ r^{2} r_{0}^{3} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}}\Bigr)
\end{aligned}
\end{equation}
\begin{equation}
\begin{aligned}
\Tmn u^\mu u^\nu\;\text{(WEC)} &= \frac{1}{32 \pi r^{3} r_{0}^{2} \left(\omega_{0}^{2} r^{2} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r} + 2 \beta} - e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}}\right) e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}}}\Bigl(- 4 \alpha^{2} \omega_{0}^{2} r r_{0}^{4} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&+ 4 \alpha^{2} \omega_{0}^{2} r_{0}^{5} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&+ 4 \alpha \beta \omega_{0}^{2} r^{3} r_{0}^{2} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&- 4 \alpha \beta \omega_{0}^{2} r^{2} r_{0}^{3} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&- 2 \alpha \gamma \omega_{0}^{2} r r_{0}^{4} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&+ 4 \alpha \omega_{0}^{2} r^{2} r_{0}^{3} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&- 6 \alpha \omega_{0}^{2} r r_{0}^{4} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&+ 3 \beta^{2} \omega_{0}^{4} r^{7} e^{4 \beta} e^{\frac{4 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} \\
&- 3 \beta^{2} \omega_{0}^{4} r^{6} r_{0} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{4 \beta} e^{\frac{4 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} \\
&+ 5 \beta^{2} \omega_{0}^{2} r^{5} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&- 5 \beta^{2} \omega_{0}^{2} r^{4} r_{0} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&- 2 \beta \gamma \omega_{0}^{2} r^{3} r_{0}^{2} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&- 16 \beta \omega_{0}^{2} r^{4} r_{0} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&+ 14 \beta \omega_{0}^{2} r^{3} r_{0}^{2} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&- 2 \gamma \omega_{0}^{2} r^{2} r_{0}^{3} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&+ 4 \gamma r_{0}^{3} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{\frac{4 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&- 2 \omega_{0}^{2} r^{2} r_{0}^{3} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&+ 4 r r_{0}^{2} e^{\frac{4 \beta r}{r_{0}}}\Bigr)
\end{aligned}
\end{equation}
\begin{equation}
\begin{aligned}
\rho \equiv \Tmn u^\mu u^\nu\big|_{u=\partial_t} &= \frac{1}{32 \pi^{10} r^{11} r_{0}^{5} e^{\frac{4 \alpha r_{0}}{r} + \frac{12 \beta r}{r_{0}} - 12 \beta}}\Bigl(\left(4 \pi^{9} \alpha^{2} \omega_{0}^{2} r^{9} r_{0}^{7} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{4 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{10 \beta r}{r_{0}}} - 4 \pi^{9} \alpha^{2} \omega_{0}^{2} r^{8} r_{0}^{8} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{4 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{10 \beta r}{r_{0}}} - 4 \pi^{9} \alpha \beta \omega_{0}^{2} r^{11} r_{0}^{5} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{4 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{10 \beta r}{r_{0}}} + 4 \pi^{9} \alpha \beta \omega_{0}^{2} r^{10} r_{0}^{6} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{4 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{10 \beta r}{r_{0}}} + 2 \pi^{9} \alpha \gamma \omega_{0}^{2} r^{9} r_{0}^{7} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{4 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{10 \beta r}{r_{0}}} - 4 \pi^{9} \alpha \omega_{0}^{2} r^{10} r_{0}^{6} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{4 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{10 \beta r}{r_{0}}} + 6 \pi^{9} \alpha \omega_{0}^{2} r^{9} r_{0}^{7} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{4 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{10 \beta r}{r_{0}}} - 3 \pi^{9} \beta^{2} \omega_{0}^{4} r^{15} r_{0}^{3} e^{4 \beta} e^{\frac{6 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{8 \beta r}{r_{0}}} + 3 \pi^{9} \beta^{2} \omega_{0}^{4} r^{14} r_{0}^{4} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{4 \beta} e^{\frac{6 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{8 \beta r}{r_{0}}} - 5 \pi^{9} \beta^{2} \omega_{0}^{2} r^{13} r_{0}^{3} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{4 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{10 \beta r}{r_{0}}} + 5 \pi^{9} \beta^{2} \omega_{0}^{2} r^{12} r_{0}^{4} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{4 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{10 \beta r}{r_{0}}} + 2 \pi^{9} \beta \gamma \omega_{0}^{2} r^{11} r_{0}^{5} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{4 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{10 \beta r}{r_{0}}} + 16 \pi^{9} \beta \omega_{0}^{2} r^{12} r_{0}^{4} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{4 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{10 \beta r}{r_{0}}} - 14 \pi^{9} \beta \omega_{0}^{2} r^{11} r_{0}^{5} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{4 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{10 \beta r}{r_{0}}} + 2 \pi^{9} \gamma \omega_{0}^{2} r^{10} r_{0}^{6} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{4 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{10 \beta r}{r_{0}}} - 4 \pi^{9} \gamma r^{8} r_{0}^{6} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{12 \beta r}{r_{0}}} + 2 \pi^{9} \omega_{0}^{2} r^{10} r_{0}^{6} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{4 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{10 \beta r}{r_{0}}} - 4 \pi^{9} r^{9} r_{0}^{5} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{12 \beta r}{r_{0}}}\right) e^{- 12 \beta}\Bigr)
\end{aligned}
\end{equation}
\subsection{Throat limit ($r \to b^+$)}
\begin{equation}
\begin{aligned}
\lim_{r\to b^+}\rho &= \frac{1}{32 \pi r^{3} r_{0}^{2}}\Bigl(\left(4 \alpha^{2} \omega_{0}^{2} r r_{0}^{4} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} - 4 \alpha^{2} \omega_{0}^{2} r_{0}^{5} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} - 4 \alpha \beta \omega_{0}^{2} r^{3} r_{0}^{2} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} + 4 \alpha \beta \omega_{0}^{2} r^{2} r_{0}^{3} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} + 2 \alpha \gamma \omega_{0}^{2} r r_{0}^{4} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} - 4 \alpha \omega_{0}^{2} r^{2} r_{0}^{3} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} + 6 \alpha \omega_{0}^{2} r r_{0}^{4} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} - 3 \beta^{2} \omega_{0}^{4} r^{7} e^{4 \beta} e^{\frac{4 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} + 3 \beta^{2} \omega_{0}^{4} r^{6} r_{0} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{4 \beta} e^{\frac{4 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} - 5 \beta^{2} \omega_{0}^{2} r^{5} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} + 5 \beta^{2} \omega_{0}^{2} r^{4} r_{0} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} + 2 \beta \gamma \omega_{0}^{2} r^{3} r_{0}^{2} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} + 16 \beta \omega_{0}^{2} r^{4} r_{0} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} - 14 \beta \omega_{0}^{2} r^{3} r_{0}^{2} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} + 2 \gamma \omega_{0}^{2} r^{2} r_{0}^{3} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} - 4 \gamma r_{0}^{3} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{\frac{4 \beta r}{r_{0}}} + 2 \omega_{0}^{2} r^{2} r_{0}^{3} r_{0}^{\gamma} \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} - 4 r r_{0}^{2} e^{\frac{4 \beta r}{r_{0}}}\right) e^{- \frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} e^{- \frac{4 \beta r}{r_{0}}}\Bigr)
\end{aligned}
\end{equation}
\subsection{Scalar-tensor bounding}
With non-minimal coupling $\zeta\,\phi R$, the bound on negative lab-frame density requires
\begin{equation}
\begin{aligned}
\rho_{\mathrm{neg}}+\zeta\phi R &= \frac{1}{2 r^{5} r_{0}^{2} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}}}\Bigl(- 4 \alpha^{2} \phi_{st} r r_{0}^{4} \zeta e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&+ 4 \alpha^{2} \phi_{st} r_{0}^{5} r_{0}^{\gamma} \zeta \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&- 2 \alpha \gamma \phi_{st} r r_{0}^{4} r_{0}^{\gamma} \zeta \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&- 2 \alpha \phi_{st} r r_{0}^{4} r_{0}^{\gamma} \zeta \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&+ \beta^{2} \omega_{0}^{2} \phi_{st} r^{7} \zeta e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} \\
&- \beta^{2} \omega_{0}^{2} \phi_{st} r^{6} r_{0} r_{0}^{\gamma} \zeta \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{2 \beta} e^{\frac{2 \alpha r_{0}}{r}} \\
&- 4 \gamma \phi_{st} r^{2} r_{0}^{3} r_{0}^{\gamma} \zeta \left(\frac{1}{r}\right)^{\gamma} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&- 4 \phi_{st} r^{3} r_{0}^{2} \zeta e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}} \\
&+ 2 r^{5} r_{0}^{2} \rho_{neg} e^{\frac{2 \beta r}{r_{0}}}\Bigr)
\end{aligned}
\end{equation}
For $\zeta>0$ and $\phi R>0$ at the throat, $|\rho_{\mathrm{neg}}|$ is capped by $|\zeta\,\phi\,R|$.
\end{small}
